shortDescription: Bright 1-bedroom condo in Don Mills with floor-to-ceiling windows and stunning city views.
fullDescription: Welcome to 1 Concorde Place, Unit 2003 in the vibrant Don Mills neighbourhood. This well-appointed condominium suite delivers effortless urban living with premium amenities. The main living area boasts an open-concept design with pot lights and a cosy gas fireplace. The kitchen has been fully renovated with soft-close cabinetry, stone counters, and a breakfast bar. All 1 bedrooms are generously sized, and the primary offers a spa-inspired four-piece ensuite. A private outdoor space — perfect for morning coffee or summer entertaining — completes the package. This coveted pocket puts you within walking distance of top schools, green spaces, and vibrant dining.
keyFeatures: Chef’s kitchen with granite countertops and premium appliances
Steps to TTC subway and streetcar
